purpose: Planning manifest for applying the OceanGame sprite-map pipeline to Area 01 previews without changing runtime gameplay or collision.

coordinate_space.units: Godot 2D scene pixels for the source map; preview PNG pixels for rendered review images
coordinate_space.origin: Source polygons come from area_01_blockout_source_map_v1.json using Main.tscn world-coordinate planning anchors.
coordinate_space.conversion: Preview renderer scales and offsets source-map world coordinates into 2400x1200 review images.
coordinate_space.runtime_authority: The preview images are not runtime authority. Collision must remain explicit source-map/Godot geometry.

topology.current_status: The current runtime-authoritative blockout map is wider than the original starter pocket but still uses angular blockout wall slabs.
topology.target_status: The surface-floor reference should become the future source geometry: open water surface over a continuous seafloor with cave holes and deeper branches.
topology.recommendation: Revise or replace the current blockout source-map JSON before wiring sprite art into Godot.

representation_plan.solid_terrain: Polygon2D fills plus CollisionPolygon2D using the same named source polygons.
representation_plan.terrain_art: Reusable Sprite2D rim trims, cave-mouth frames, edge highlights, decor clusters, and optional terrain fill texture.
representation_plan.triggers: Area2D scene hooks for oxygen surface, ship offload, cave entrances, pickups, scans, gates, hazards, and return currents.
representation_plan.tilemap: Deferred unless a layer is genuinely grid-friendly or decorative.

validation_notes: Do not infer collision from preview PNG pixels.
Every runtime solid terrain entry must have visible terrain, rim/lip, and matching collision.
Surface oxygen refill and ship cargo offload must remain separate hooks.
Cave mouths must not have blocking collision across the navigable entrance.
Current-run pickups and scans must be reachable or explicitly marked future-locked.
next_pipeline_step: Create an Area 01 surface-floor geometry source-map JSON in Godot world coordinates before runtime sprite wiring.
